name: Eastern Shore Custom Clubs
address: 24 Village Green Dr Suite 201, Ocean View, DE 19970
about: Eastern Shore Custom Clubs is a full-service professional club fitting and repair center. They utilize the latest technology, including Trackman 4 and Sportsbox 3D cameras, to provide detailed swing analysis and club fitting services. The venue is owned by a PGA professional with nearly 20 years of experience, focusing on custom fitting, lessons, and club repairs to help golfers improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Professional club fitting using advanced Trackman 4 technology
Comprehensive club repair services to keep equipment in top condition
PGA-led instruction available by appointment for all skill levels

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced ball and clubhead capture technology

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs for fitting or repair, but they also offer clubs and shaft combinations from many manufacturers including Taylormade, Mizuno, Cobra, Callaway, and Srixon.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention food or drink services, suggesting it's BYOB if allowed.

faq.question: How long does a typical 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify timeframes for 18-hole simulations, but lessons and fittings are available by appointment.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not specifically mention child-friendly features or junior programs.
